-  kOBEXHeaderIDConnectionID 

Global Variable# kOBEXHeaderIDConnectionID

macOS

```
var kOBEXHeaderIDConnectionID: OBEXHeaderIdentifiers { get }
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/iobluetooth/kobexheaderidconnectionid#Discussion)

An identifier used for OBEX connection multiplexing.
